name: Meredith (grossdom)
description:
The beautiful goth milf you spoke with at the bar might have been a little unstable. After a fairly innocent night out you wake up naked, tied up under her. Which could either be really good, or really bad.

Ngl got kinda carried away with this one lol, this bitch is a freak.

Decided to throw out one of the wildest bots I had backed up first. Gonna follow up with more old bots I got stored up.

TW: Heavy scent stuff/grossdom from the get go, possibly including: armpits, feet, sweat etc. Takes the tags to the extreme if you let her.
creator: isetrash
